src/backend/utils/mb/Unicode/euc-jis-2004-std.txt
1## EUC-JIS-2004 (JIS X 0213:2004 Appendix 3) vs Unicode mapping table
2## 
3## Date: 3 May 2009
4## License:
5## 	Copyright (C) 2001 earthian@tama.or.jp, All Rights Reserved.
6## 	Copyright (C) 2001 I'O, All Rights Reserved.
7## 	Copyright (C) 2006, 2009 Project X0213, All Rights Reserved.
8## 	You can use, modify, distribute this table freely.
9## Note:
10## 	[1983]	JIS codepoint defined by JIS X 0208-1983
11## 	[1990]	JIS codepoint defined by JIS X 0208-1990
12## 	[2000]	JIS codepoint defined by JIS X 0213:2000
13## 	[2004]	JIS codepoint defined by JIS X 0213:2004
14## 	[Unicode3.1]	UCS codepoint defined by Unicode 3.1
15## 	[Unicode3.2]	UCS codepoint defined by Unicode 3.2
16## 	Fullwidth	UCS fullwidth form (U+Fxxx)
17## 	Windows 	Windows (CP932) mapping
18## 	Some 0213 character can't represent by one UCS character.
19## 	In this table, such characters are described as 'U+xxxx+xxxx'.
20## 
21## JIS	Unicode	Name	Note
